ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the subject */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the subject */,
  "cognitive_ability_score" REAL /* Cognitive ability score of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimenters" (
  "experimenter_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experimenter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experimenter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the experimenter */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the experimenter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimenter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimenter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experimenter_id" TEXT /* Experimenter ID associated with the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* Experiment ID associated with the trial */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Subject ID participating in the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number for the experiment */,
  "target_sentence" TEXT /* Sentence presented to the subject */,
  "target_side" TEXT /* Side of the target in the presentation */,
  "other_side" TEXT /* Side of the alternative in the presentation */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., training) */,
  "date_stamp" TEXT /* Date when the trial was conducted */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time when the trial was conducted */,
  "side_chosen" TEXT /* Side chosen by the subject during the trial */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "rt" REAL /* Reaction time in milliseconds */,
  "play_counter" INTEGER /* Counter for the number of times the trial was played */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the trial presentation */,
  "sentence_type" TEXT /* Type of sentence presented (e.g., PO) */,
  "animacy" TEXT /* Animacy of the target in the sentence (e.g., Pred) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_sentence_type FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_type") REFERENCES sentence_types ("sentence_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_animacy FOREIGN KEY ("animacy") REFERENCES animacy_conditions ("animacy_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., training) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentence_types" (
  "sentence_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence type */,
  "sentence_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentence type (e.g., PO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentence type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animacy_conditions" (
  "animacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animacy condition */,
  "animacy_name" TEXT /* Name of the animacy condition (e.g., Pred) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animacy condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the animacy condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the animacy condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "rt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time entry */,
  "trial_id" TEXT /* ID of the trial associated with the reaction times */,
  "average_rt" REAL /* Average reaction time for the trial */,
  "max_rt" REAL /* Maximum reaction time recorded during the trial */,
  "min_rt" REAL /* Minimum reaction time recorded during the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction time record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction time record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
